name: hemodialise-ain-tedless
description: Application de Gestion du Formulaire CNAS PEC

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm start --prefix server" "npm run build --prefix client && npm run preview --prefix client"
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server && node server/db/init.js
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix server" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && electron ."
